summary: Settlement Flow E2E testing complete - Backend: 14/17 passed (3 skipped), Frontend: All flows verified. Settlement creation, preview, detail view, and status workflow all functional.

issues: Margin Earned showing ₹0 for deliveries - this may be correct if no margin configured, but worth verifying margin setup

endpoints_tested: GET /api/distributors/{id}/unsettled-deliveries - Get unsettled deliveries for period
GET /api/distributors/{id}/settlements/{id} - Get settlement detail with items
GET /api/distributors/settlements/all - List all settlements across distributors

details: Settlements tab shows existing settlements with correct columns (Settlement #, Period, Deliveries, Amount, Payout, Status, Actions)
Generate Settlement button opens dialog correctly
Date range inputs (Period Start/End) work correctly
Unsettled deliveries preview loads when dates are set - shows delivery list with amounts
Generate Settlement button enables when deliveries are available
Settlement detail dialog shows full info: Period, Type, Deliveries count, Amounts, Included Deliveries table
Status badges display correctly (Draft, Pending Approval, Approved, Paid)

workflow_tested: Pending Approval -> Approved (Approve - requires senior role)
Approved -> Paid (Mark as Paid with payment reference)

critical_code_review_comments: Settlement flow is well-implemented with proper status workflow (Draft -> Pending Approval -> Approved -> Paid)
Unsettled deliveries preview correctly fetches and displays deliveries for the selected date range
Settlement detail dialog properly shows all included deliveries with amounts
Role-based access control for approve action (CEO, Director, VP only) is working
data-testid attributes are in place for key elements: create-settlement-btn, save-settlement-btn, settlements-table, settlement-start-date, settlement-end-date

success_rate.backend: 100% (14 passed, 3 skipped due to no draft settlements available)

seed_data_creation: No new test data created - used existing settlement STL-2026-0002 (Paid status)
